text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by a field...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Urara, I'm ready to plant the seeds! I'm gonna sow
with passion!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?! I like passion fruit too, actually!
choice_data_list:
You both readying to do some gardening
together?

You both readying to do some gardening
together?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! Since garden work is physically demanding, it
can serve well as training!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup! We can help the academy and grow
stronger at the same time!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started then! Strong! Dynamic! Seed
sowing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Fly, you future carrots! This field is your squared
circle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Scatter! Scatter! Scatter!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll put one here... And here... Hehe. I hope every
one of you turn out tasty! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The unique pair continue their seed sowing with
good cheer. However, this might take a while with
just the two of them.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a new challenger enters the fray?! Bueno!
We'd love an extra pair of hands!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! This'll be even more fun with three of us
working together!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let's compete to see who can plant
the most! Ready, set, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, the three of us go all in on the garden
work.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Phew! All finished! But look, I'm covered head to
toe in dirt.
choice_data_list: It means you were working hard.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right? It's proof of a job well done! Splendid, in
fact! Magnifico!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It feels like we just finished running a race on dirt!
Hehe. This was so much fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. The fun isn't over yet, Urara!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Since we've already got dirt all over, let's get into
even more games!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! Yippee, yippee! ♪ What do you want to
play, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Curious, are we?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well, I've got absolutely nothing in mind!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What if we ask Trainer for ideas?!
What do you think we should do next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why they'd turn to me for a
suggestion. What's something that would be fun?
choice_data_list: Let's play in the water to rinse off your clothes!
Go all out in a mud wrestling match!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Playing in the water! A great idea! Let's get our
splash on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the three of us head to our next
destination.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: We're here! We're here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Playing in water is the best idea yet!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! It's so cooold! But it feels refreshing!
C'mon, El, hurry up and get in!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Just you wait! It's time for my Luchador
Dive!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Mambo! Let's take to the skies and dive
into the water!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Scrawww!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I figured I'd bring my pet Mambo out to spread
his wings since we're playin' outside!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That was a super cool splash! Do it again,
El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
De acuerdo! Let's do it together this time! Dive in
with dynamic power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm a little shocked by the turn of events, I
enjoy a fun time with the two bubbly
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wrestling?! That sounds fun! El, do a cool
technique!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
De acuerdo! I won't disappoint you! First, follow
me to the special ring!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She leads us to a sandbox in a nearby park.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ready? I'm gonna leap up high and do a shooting
sand press!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Poof!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You can't outdo me! I'll counterattack with my
special-made mud pies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splat! Splat! Splat!
choice_data_list: Hey! I'm getting hit by stray fire!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Muy bien, Urara! We both unleashed our full
power in a match for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It was really exciting! Let's do it again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two continue playing and playing, as though
fueled by infinite reserves of energy.
